fields.title: Sony WH-1000XM4 Wireless Headphones
fields.description: Excellent condition, midnight blue color. Includes original carrying case, USB-C charging cable, and 3.5mm audio jack. Battery life still lasts up to 30 hours. Active Noise Cancelling works perfectly.

fields.title: iPad Air (4th Generation) - 64GB Wi-Fi
fields.description: Space Gray, pristine condition with no scratches. Screen protector applied since day one. Comes with the original box and a generic magnetic folio case.
fields.desired_offer: Looking to exchange for a comparable Windows laptop (e.g., ThinkPad or Dell XPS) for coding.

fields.title: Mechanical Keyboard (Keychron K2 V2)
fields.description: RGB backlight with Gateron Brown tactile switches. Aluminum frame, Mac/Windows compatible. Lightly used for two months, thoroughly cleaned.
fields.desired_offer: Will trade for an Apple Magic Trackpad 2 in black or white.

fields.title: Samsung 27" CRG5 Curved Gaming Monitor
fields.description: 240Hz refresh rate, 4ms response time, 1080p resolution. G-Sync compatible. Perfect for competitive gaming. No dead pixels. Moving out of town and need it gone.

fields.title: Fujifilm X-T30 Mirrorless Camera (Body Only)
fields.description: 26.1MP APS-C sensor, black body. Minor cosmetic wear on the bottom plate, but mechanically and optically perfect. Includes two batteries and a dual charger.
fields.desired_offer: Open to exchanging for a DJI Mini 3 Pro or Mini 4 Pro drone setup.

fields.title: Nintendo Switch OLED Model (White
fields.description: Brand new, factory sealed in box. Includes dock, Joy-Cons, grip, and cables. Received as a gift but I already own one.
fields.desired_offer: Would love to trade for a PlayStation 5 Slim (Digital or Disc edition), willing to add cash on top if necessary.
